model_target.reason: Fast concept iteration for a photoreal editorial portrait without dense typography.

intent.goal: Create a moody editorial portrait for a music artist social campaign
intent.audience: indie pop listeners and art-forward social audiences

subject.action: pausing beneath market awnings after stepping out of the rain
subject.pose: waist-up, one hand lightly touching the awning edge
subject.wardrobe: black nylon bomber with silver zipper and small in-ear monitor

scene.background: stacked vendor signs, reflective tarps, damp concrete, distant umbrellas
environment_logic: wet surfaces should catch mixed warm and cool practical light
crowd presence should be implied in the distance but not cross the foreground
the alley should remain spatially plausible and human-scaled

composition.framing: waist-up with the face occupying the upper-center focal zone
composition.depth_behavior: shallow but readable depth with soft background separation
composition.negative_space: soft upper-left pocket for possible future cover lines

lighting.key: warm tungsten stall light from camera right
lighting.fill: cool cyan ambient bounce from the alley
lighting.rim: thin magenta edge on the jacket shoulder and hairline
lighting.atmosphere: fine rain mist catching highlights without becoming heavy fog
material_response: soft reflections on metal zipper teeth
lighting.color_temperature: warm key versus cool ambient contrast

style.texture: clean but not over-sharpened smartphone-night realism
